{{Forms
|form=angel
|description=When you are in Angel Form, you cannot help but try to convert whoever you meet during your explorations Your followers provide alms, fueling your divine blessings
|sequence1={{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of Matthew}}
|source1=3 total [[Altar]] God Descents
|effect=In Angel Form, Snail HP +5%<br>Explore in Angel Form, gain +2% Fungus Chests<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +5m
|reward={{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +1.2k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +50}}
|sequence2={{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of Luke}}
|source2=6 total [[Altar]] God Descents
|sequence3={{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of John}}
|source3=10 total [[Altar]] Descents
|sequence4={{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of the Hebrews}}
|source4=15 total [[Altar]] God Descents
|t1=Pilgrim
|hp1=20
|atk1=10
|def1=10
|rush1=20
|t2=Chanter
|t3=Priest of Light
|t4=Prophet
|t5=The Blessed
|t6=Saint
|t7=Judicator
|t1Rows={{FormRow
|segment=1A<br>HP Up A-I
|time1=0:20:00
|cellCost1=100
|btadCost1=50
|effect1=Snail HP +50
|inc1=10}}{{FormRow
|segment=1B<br>ATK Up A-I
|time1=0:30:00
|cellCost1=150
|btadCost1=75
|effect1=Snail ATK +75
|inc1=12}}{{FormRow
|segment=1C<br>FTH Up A-I
|time1=0:40:00
|cellCost1=200
|btadCost1=100
|effect1=Snail FTH +50<br>When in Angel Form, Gain +1% Fungus Chests in explorations
|inc1=16}}{{FormRow
|segment=2A<br>HP Up Gene I
|time1=0:20:00
|cellCost1=100
|btadCost1=50
|effect1=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +60
|inc1=10}}{{FormRow
|segment=2B<br>ATK Up Gene I
|time1=0:30:00
|cellCost1=150
|btadCost1=75
|effect1=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +6
|inc1=16}}{{FormRow
|segment=2C<br>All Genes Up I
|time1=0:40:00
|cellCost1=200
|btadCost=100
|effect1=Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2
|inc1=16}}{{FormRow
|segment=3<br>Genetic Resonance
|time1=0:30:00
|cellCost1=150
|btadCost1=75
|effect1=Dispatchable Research Partners +1
|inc1=30}}{{FormRow
|segment=4<br>Angel Gene Lock II
|time1=1:00:00
|cellCost1=600
|btadCost=300
|effect1=Advance to Angel Form T2: Chanter<br>Angel Minion Max Tier Up
|inc1=30}}
|3to4=
{{!}}-
{{!}}Obtain {{RewardIconWithText|Saint's Book}} from Super Gene Expert{{!}}{{!}}Speak with the [[Mailbox#Super Gene Expert|Super Gene Expert]] from the [[Mailbox]]
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend once FTH reaches 4,000{{!}}{{!}}Obtain, upgrade, and awakend FTH [[Relics]] and consume FTH-Fungi
|4to5={{!}}Summon the Gate of Heaven at the [[Altar]] while in Angel Form{{!}}{{!}}Enable Angel Form and reach 100% at the [[Altar]]. This will summon the Gate of Heaven<br>'''This must be done with normal souls and not special summoning objects'''
{{!}}-
{{!}}Reach Angel Form Trial Lv.100{{!}}{{!}}Req. approx. >=747k Power
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend once FTH reaches 8,000{{!}}{{!}}Obtain, upgrade, and awaken FTH [[Relics]] and consume FTH-Fungi
|5to6={{!}}Ride the [[Rocket]] to the [[Koryeon Domain]]
{{!}}-
{{!}}Beat Pawson in a Godslay Battle
{{!}}-
{{!}}Reach Angel Form Trial Lv.200
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend after FTH reaches 15,000
|6to7={{!}}Summon the Gate of Heaven at the [[Altar]] in Angel Form{{!}}{{!}}Reach 100% with normal souls at the [[Altar]] while in Angel Form
{{!}}-
{{!}}The Black Gate opens at Lv.1,825{{!}}{{!}}Display the {{RewardIconWithLink|Key of Redemption|green}}
{{!}}-
{{!}}Clear the Fallen Lands{{!}}{{!}}Clear the Fallen Lands Dungeon on Fl.1,825
{{!}}-
{{!}}Reach Angel Form Trial Lv.300{{!}}{{!}}
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend after FTH reaches 20,000{{!}}{{!}}
}}
<!--

Just in case the new template breaks, here's all the old formatting and info until I'm sure it's all stable -Klei



{{Form|formName=Angel|image1=Angel Form I.png|caption-image1=When you are in Angel Form, you cannot help but try to convert whoever you meet during your explorations Your followers provide alms, fueling your divine blessings.}}

==Angel Sequences==
Each sequence is acquired from a unique source and all four are required to obtain the T4 Angel Evolution.
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" cellpadding="10"
!Trait !!Source !!Boosts !!Rewards
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of Matthew}}
| 3 total [[Altar]] God Descents
| In Angel Form, Snail HP +5%<br>Explore in Angel Form, gain +2% Fungus Chests<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +5m
| {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +1.2k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +50}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of Luke}}
|6 total [[Altar]] God Descents
|In Angel Form, Snail ATK+5%<br>Explore in Angel Form, gain +2% Fungus Chests<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +5m
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +1.2k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +50}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of John}}
| 10 total [[Altar]] God Descents
|In Angel Form, Snail DEF +5%<br>Explore in Angel Form, gain +2% Fungus Chests<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +5m
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +1.2k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +50}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of the Hebrews}}
|15 total [[Altar]] God Descents
|In Angel Form, Snail RUSH +5%<br>Explore in Angel Form, gain +2% Fungus Chests<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +5m
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +1.2k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +50}}
|}

==Tiers and Stats==

=== Base Stats ===
Below is each Tier and their base stats in Angel Form. The stat bonus provided by obtaining form sequences is not included until Tier 4 as it requires all four sequences to be activated.
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" cellpadding="10"
!Tier
!Form Name
!HP !!ATK !!DEF !!RUSH !!Bonuses
|-
|I
|Pilgrim
| +20%
| +10%
| +10%
| +20%
| When in Angel Form, gain +10% Fungus Chests in explorations
|-
|II 
|Chanter
| +20%
| +15%
| +15%
| +20%
| When in Angel Form, gain +19% Fungus Chests in explorations
|-
|III
|Priest of Light
| +30%
| +15%
| +15%
| +30%
|When in Angel Form, gain +26% Fungus Chests in explorations<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +15m
|-
|IV
|Prophet
| +35%
| +25%
| +25%
| +35%
|When in Angel Form, gain +33% Fungus Chests in explorations<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +20m<br>In Angel Form Trial, DMG +30%
|-
|V
|The Blessed
| +45%
| +25%
| +25%
| +45%
|When in Angel Form, gain +30% Fungus Chests in explorations<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +20m
|-
|VI
|Saint
| +45%
| +30%
| +30%
| +45%
|
|-
|VII
|Judicator
|  +55%
|  +30%
|  +30%
|  +55%
|All ELMT RES +127<br>When in Angel Form, gain +48% Fungus Chests in explorations<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +20m
|}

=== Extra Boosts ===
After T4, FTH [[relics]] can be awakened for extra boosts. 
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" cellpadding="8"
!Relics Awakened !!Boosts!!Rewards
|-
|1
|In All Forms, All ELMT RES +2
|
|-
|10
|In All Forms, All ELMT RES +15
|Super Treasure Chest +50
|-
|20
|
|}

==Gene Research==
After unlocking Angel Form during early [[Evolution]], the Super Gene Expert will arrive in the [[Mailbox]] to give you the parts necessary to unlock the Research Machine. 

[[File:Angel Gene Research.png|left]]

Research is divided according to the Tier of your Form, abbreviated to T1, T2, T3, etc. This is further divided into 8 separate research segments. The numbered list on the left shows an example DNA strand where 1A-1C is on the left and 2A-2C is on the right. These will switch back and forth with each tier, however 1 is always blue and corresponds to Snail Stat boosts across all Forms and 2 is always yellow and corresponds to Troop Stat boosts according to Demon Minions in battle. The middle segment gives special bonuses and the last segment unlock the Ritual required to ascend to the next form.

=== Research Order ===
Note that items must be researched in a certain order, generally from top to bottom. Each segment has a certain number of levels and can only be researched as high as the previous segment. If 1A is only Lv.3 out of 5, 1B can only be researched to Lv.3 as well. The middle bubble can only be researched as high as the lowest of either B segment. If 1B is Lv.2 and 2B is Lv.1, the middle bubble can only be researched to Lv.1, etc. The final bubble can only be researched (always 1 level) when all other research before it is completed and will give the necessary ritual steps to ascend to the next tier.

{{Clear}}

==Evolution==
Upgrading Angel Form requires Angel Cells and a certain amount of FTH. This Form is best used in Cathay and increases the chance of finding Fungus Chests.
<tabber>
|-|T1=
{| class="wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! colspan="3" |Cost
! rowspan="2" |Effect
! rowspan="2" |DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells 
!B-tads
|-
|style="text-align:center"|1A<br>HP Up A-I
|1||0:20:00||100||50||Snail HP +50||10
|-
|style="text-align:center"|1B<br>ATK Up A-I
|1||0:30:00||150||75||Snail ATK +10||12
|-
|style="text-align:center"|1C<br>FTH Up A-I
|1||0:40:00||200||100||Snail FTH +50<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +1% Fungus Chest in explorations||16
|-
|style="text-align:center"|2A<br>HP Up Gene I
|1||0:20:00||100||50||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +60||10
|-
|style="text-align:center"|2B<br>ATK Up Gene I
|1||0:30:00||150||75||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +6||12
|-
|style="text-align:center"|2C<br>All Genes Up I
|1||0:40:00||200||100||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2||16
|-
|style="text-align:center"|3<br>Genetic Resonance
|1||0:30:00||150||75||Dispatchable Research Partners +1||30
|-
|style="text-align:center"|4<br>Angel Gene Lock II
|1||1:00:00||600||300||Advance to Angel Form T2: Chanter<br>Angel Minion Max Tier Up||30
|}
|-|T2=
{| class="wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! colspan="3" |Cost
! rowspan="2" | Effect
! rowspan="2" |DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells 
!B-tads
|-
| style="text-align:center" |2A<br>DEF Up Gene A-I
|1||1:00:00||250||250||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop DEF +6||20
|-
| style="text-align:center" |2B<br>RUSH Up Gene A-I
|1||1:15:00||300||300||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +6||24
|-
| style="text-align:center" |2C<br>All Genes Up A-I
|1||1:30:00||350||350||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2||28
|-
| style="text-align:center" |1A<br>DEF Up A-I
|1||1:00:00||250||250||Snail DEF +10||20
|-
| style="text-align:center" |1B<br>RUSH Up A-I
|1||1:15:00||300||300||Snail RUSH +10||24
|-
| style="text-align:center" |1C<br>FTH Up A-I
|1||1:30:00||350||350||Snail FTH +50<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +1% Fungus Chests in explorations||28
|-
| style="text-align:center" |3<br>Blessing I
|1||1:15:00||300||300||{{Relink|Star of David}} +20||75
|-
| style="text-align:center" |4<br>Angel Gene Lock III
|1||3:00:00||1,200||1,200||Advance to Angel Form T3: Priest of Light<br>Angel Minion Max Tier Up||50
|}
|-|T3=
{| class="wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! colspan="3" |Cost
! rowspan="2" | Effect
! rowspan="2" |DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells 
!B-tads
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1A<br>HP Up A-II
|1||1:30:00||400||600||Snail HP +20||30
|-
|2||2:00:00||600||900||Snail HP +50||45
|-
|3||2:30:00||800||1,200||Snail HP +90||60
|-
|4||3:00:00||1,000||1,500||Snail HP +140||75
|-
|5||3:30:00||1,200||1,800||Snail HP +200||90
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1B<br>ATK Up A-II
|1||1:45:00||600||900||Snail ATK +4||36
|-
|2||2:30:00||900||1,350||Snail ATK +10||54
|-
|3||3:15:00||1,200||1,800||Snail ATK +18||72
|-
|4||4:00:00||1,500||2,250||Snail ATK +28||90
|-
|5||4:45:00||1,800||2,700||Snail ATK +40||108
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1C<br>FTH Up A-II
|1||2:00:00||800||1,200||FTH +20<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +1% Fungus Chests in explorations||42
|-
|2||3:00:00||1,200||1,800||FTH +50<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +1.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||63
|-
|3||4:00:00||1,600||2,400||FTH +90<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +2% Fungus Chests in explorations||84
|-
|4||5:00:00||2,000||3,000||FTH +140<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +2.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||105
|-
|5||6:00:00||2,400||3,600||FTH +200<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +3% Fungus Chests in explorations||126
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2A<br>HP Up Gene A-II
|1||1:30:00||400||600||Per 10 Angel Minions in batle, Troop HP +30<br>30
|-
|2||2:00:00||600||900||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +60<br>45
|-
|3||2:30:00||800||1,200||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +90<br>60
|-
|4||3:00:00||1,000||1,500||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +120||75
|-
|5||3:30:00||1,200||1,800||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +150||90
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2B<br>ATK Up Gene A-II
|1||1:45:00||600||900||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +3||36
|-
|2||2:30:00||900||1,350||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +6||54
|-
|3||3:15:00||1,200||1,800||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +9||72
|-
|4||4:00:00||1,500||2,250||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +12||90
|-
|5||4:45:00||1,800||2,700||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +15||108
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2C<br>All Genes Up A-II
|1||2:00:00||800||1,200||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +1||42
|-
|2||3:00:00||1,200||1,800||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2||63
|-
|3||4:00:00||1,600||2,400||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +3||84
|-
|4||5:00:00||2,000||3,000||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +4||105
|-
|5||6:00:00||2,400||3,600||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +5||126
|-
| style="text-align:center" |3<br>Prayer Staff
|1||1:45:00||600||900||Obtain {{Gearlink|blue|Form|Prayer Staff}}||105
|-
| style="text-align:center" |4<br>Angel Ritual IV
|1||6:00:00||3,000||4,500||Advance to Angel Form T4: Prophet<br>In Angel Form Trial, DMG +30%<br>Angel Minion Max Tier Up||120
|}
|-|T4=
{| class="wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! colspan="3" |Cost
! rowspan="2" | Effect
! rowspan="2" |DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells 
!B-tads
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2A<br>DEF Up Gene A-II
|1||2:00:00||1,000||2,000||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop DEF +3||48
|-
|2||3:30:00||1,800||3,600||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop DEF +6||72
|-
|3||5:00:00||2,600||5,200||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop DEF +9||96
|-
|4||6:30:00||3,400||6,800||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop DEF +12||120
|-
|5||8:00:00||4,200||8,400||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop DEF +15||144
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2B<br>RUSH Up Gene A-II
|1||3:00:00||2,000||4,000||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +3||54
|-
|2||5:00:00||3,600||7,200||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +6||81
|-
|3||7:00:00||5,200||10,400||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +9||108
|-
|4||9:00:00||6,800||13,600||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +12||135
|-
|5||11:00:00||8,400||16,800||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +15||162
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2C<br>ALL Genes Up A-II
|1||4:00:00||3,000||6,000||Per 10 Angel Minins in battle, Troop HARD Stats +1||60
|-
|2||7:00:00||5,400||10,800||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2||90
|-
|3||10:00:00||7,800||15,600||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +3||120
|-
|4||13:00:00||10,200||20,400||Per 10 Angel Minions in  battle, Troop HARD Stats +4||150
|-
|5||16:00:00||12,600||25,200||Per 10 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +5||180
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1A<br>DEF Up A-II
|1||2:00:00||1,000||2,000||Snail DEF +4||48
|-
|2||3:30:00||1,800||3,600||Snail DEF +10||72
|-
|3||5:00:00||2,600||5,200||Snail DEF +18||96
|-
|4||6:30:00||3,400||6,800||Snail DEF +28||120
|-
|5||8:00:00||4,200||8,400|||Snail DEF +40||144
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1B<br>RUSH Up A-II
|1||3:00:00||2,000||4,000||Snail RUSH +4||54
|-
|2||5:00:00||3,600||7,200||Snail RUSH +10||81
|-
|3||7:00:00||5,200||10,400||Snail RUSH +18||108
|-
|4||9:00:00||6,800||13,600||Snail RUSH +28||135
|-
|5||11:00;00||8,400||16,800||Snail RUSH +40||162
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1C<br>FTH Up A-II
|1||4:00:00||3,000||6,000||Snail FTH +20<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +1% Fungus Chests in explorations||60
|-
|2||7:00:00||5,400||10,800||Snail FTH +50<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +1.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||90
|-
|3||10:00:00||7,800||15,600||Snail FTH +90<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +2% Fungus Chests in explorations||120
|-
|4||13:00:00||10,200||20,400||Snail FTH +140<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +2.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||150
|-
|5||16:00:00||12,600||25,200||Snail FTH +200<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +3% Fungus Chests in explorations||180
|-
| style="text-align:center" |3<br>Angel Gene Mutation
|1||3:00:00||2,000||4,000||Snail Leadership +10<br>Angel Minion MAX +5||180
|-
| style="text-align:center" |4<br>Angel Ritual V
|1||24:00:00||15,000||30,000||Advance to Angel Form T5: The Blessed<br>In Angel Form Trial, DMG +30%<br>Angel Minion Max Tier Up||160
|}
|-|T5=
{| class="wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |
! rowspan="2" |Lv.
! colspan="3" |Cost
! rowspan="2" | Effect
! rowspan="2" |DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells 
!B-tads
|-
| rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |1A<br>HP Up A-III
|1||6:00:00||4,000||10,000||Snail HP +60||80
|-
|2||9:00:00||5,000||12,500||Snail HP +140||120
|-
|3||12:00:00||6,000||15,000||Snail HP +240||160
|-
|4||15:00:00||7,000||17,500||Snail HP +360||200
|-
|5||18:00:00||8,000||20,000||Snail HP +500||240
|-
|6||21:00:00||9,000||22,500||Snail HP +660||280
|-
|7||24:00:00||10,000||25,000||Snail HP +840||320
|-
|8||27:00:00||11,000||27,500||Snail HP +1,040||360
|-
|9||30:00:00||12,000||30,000||Snail HP +1,260||400
|-
|10||33:00:00||13,000||32,500||Snail HP +1,500||440
|-
|rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |1B<br>ATK Up A-III
|1||8:00:00||6,000||15,000||Snail ATK +12||90
|-
|2||12:00:00||7,500||18,750||Snail ATK +28||135
|-
|3||16:00:00||9,000||22,500||Snail ATK +48||180
|-
|4||20:00:00||10,500||26,250||Snail ATK +72||225
|-
|5||24:00:00||12,000||30,000||Snail ATK +100||270
|-
|6||28:00:00||13,500||33,750||Snail ATK +132||315
|-
|7||32:00:00||15,000||37,500||Snail ATK +168||360
|-
|8||36:00:00||16,500||41,250||Snail ATK +208||405
|-
|9||40:00:00||18,000||45,000||Snail ATK +252||450
|-
|10||44:00:00||19,500||48,750||Snail ATK +300||495
|-
|rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |1C<br>FTH Up A-III
|1||10:00:00||8,000||20,000||Snail FTH +30<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +2% Fungus Chests in explorations||100
|-
|2||15:00:00||10,000||25,000||Snail FTH +70<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +2.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||150
|-
|3||20:00:00||12,000||30,000||Snail FTH +120<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +3% Fungus Chests in explorations||200
|-
|4||25:00:00||14,000||35,000||Snail FTH +180<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +3.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||250
|-
|5||30:00:00||16,000||40,000||Snail FTH +250<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +4% Fungus Chests in explorations||300
|-
|6||35:00":00||18,000||45,000||Snail FTH +330<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +4.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||350
|-
|7||40:00:00||20,000||50,000||Snail FTH +420<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +5% Fungus Chests in explorations||400
|-
|8||45:00:00||22,000||55,000||Snail FTH +520<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +5.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||450
|-
|9||50:00:00||24,000||60,000||Snail FTH +630<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +6% Fungus Chests in explorations||500
|-
|10||55:00:00||26,000||65,000||Snail FTH +750<br>When in Angel Form:<br>Gain +6.5% Fungus Chests in explorations||550
|-
|rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |2A<br>HP Up Gene A-III
|1||6:00:00||4,000||10,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +90||80
|-
|2||9:00:00||5,000||12,500||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +180||120
|-
|3||12:00:00||6,000||15,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +270||160
|-
|4||15:00:00||7,000||17,500||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +360||200
|-
|5||18:00:00||8,000||20,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +450||240
|-
|6||21:00:00||9,000||22,500||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +540||280
|-
|7||24:00:00||10,000||25,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +630||320
|-
|8||27:00:00||11,000||27,500||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +720||360
|-
|9||30:00:00||12,000||30,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +810||400
|-
|10||33:00:00||13,000||32,500||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop HP +900||440
|-
|rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |2B<br>ATK Up Gene A-III
|1||8:00:00||6,000||15,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +9||90
|-
|2||12:00:00||7,500||18,750||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +18||135
|-
|3||16:00:00||9,000||22,500||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +27||180
|-
|4||20:00:00||10,500||26,250||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +36||225
|-
|5||24:00:00||12,000||30,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +45||270
|-
|6||28:00:00||13,500||22,750||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +54||315
|-
|7||32:00:00||15,000||37,500||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +63||360
|-
|8||36:00:00||16,500||41,250||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +72||405
|-
|9||40:00:00||18,000||45,000||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop ATK +81||450
|-
|10||44:00:00||19,500||48,750||Per 30 Angel Minions in battle, Troop TAK +90||495
|-
|rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |2C<br>All Genes Up A-III
|}
</tabber>

==Rank Up Rituals==
Once research is complete, a ritual will be started. Once the conditions are cleared, Angel Form will rise from in Tier.

<tabber>
|-|T4=
For Angel Form to rise from T3 to T4:
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual
!How to complete
|-
|Activate {{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of Matthew}}
|Trigger 3 total [[Altar#Gods of the Pantheon|Altar God Descents]]
|-
|Activate {{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of Luke}}
|Trigger 6 total [[Altar#Gods of the Pantheon|Altar God Descents]]
|-
|Activate {{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of John}}
|Trigger 10 total [[Altar#Gods of the Pantheon|Altar God Descents]]
|-
|Activate {{RewardIconWithText|Gospel of Hebrews}}
|Trigger 15 total [[Altar#Gods of the Pantheon|Altar God Descents]]
|-
|Obtain {{RewardIconWithText|Saint's Book}} from the Super Gene Expert
|Speak with the [[Mailbox#Super Gene Expert|Super Gene Expert]] from the [[Mailbox]]
|-
|Ascend once FTH reaches 4,000
|Obtain, upgrade, and awaken FTH [[Relics]]. Consume FTH Fungi.
|}
|-|T5=
For Angel Form to rise from T4 to T5:
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual
!How to complete
|-
|Summon the Gate of Heaven at the Altar in Angel Form
|Enable Angel Form and reach 100% at the [[Altar]]. This will summon the Gate of Heaven<br>'''This must be done with normal souls and not special summoning objects'''
|-
|Reach Angel Form Trial Lv.100
|Req. approx. 747k or greater power
|-
|Ascend once FTH reaches 8,000
|Obtain, upgrade, and awaken FTH [[Relics]]. Consume FTH Fungi.
|}
|-|T6=
For Angel Form to rise from T5 to T6:
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual
!How to Complete
|-
|Ride the [[Rocket]] to the [[Koryeon Domain]]
|
|-
|Beat Pawson in a Godslay Battle
|Defeat Pawson in a Duel
|-
|Reach Angel Form Trial Lv.200
|[[Gene Simulation|Angel Form Gene Sim]]
|-
|Ascend after FTH reaches 15,000
|Obtain, upgrade, and awaken FTH [[Relics]]. Consume FTH Fungi.
|}
|-|T7=
For Angel Form to rise from T6 to T7"
{|class="wikitable"
!Ritual
!How to Complete
|-
|Summon the Gate of Heaven at the [[Altar]] in Angel Form
|Reach 100% with normal souls at the [[Altar]] while in Angel Form
|-
|The Black Gate opens at [[Fissure#Fissure#1,000_and_onwards-0|Level 1,825]]
|Display the [[Key of Redemption]]
|-
|Clear the [[Fissure#Fissure#1,000_and_onwards-0|Fallen Lands]]
|Clear the Fallen Lands Dungeon on Floor 1,825
|-
|Reach Angel Form Trial Lv.300
|[[Gene Simulation|Angel Form Gene Sim]]
|-
|Ascend after FTH reaches 20,000
|Obtain, upgrade, and awaken FTH [[Relics]]. Consume FTH Fungi.
|}
</tabber>
